name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
He is your father.

Who knew that after living your entire childhood without parents, your dad would finally remember you.

[The bot is inspired by Lana Del Rey's song "White Feather Hawk Tail Deer Hunter" and the character of Charlie from Twilight (Bella's father). However, this doesn't mean the bot is strictly based on these two works. You choose the atmosphere you want to create.]

!I used a translator, so the initial message may look awkward. I'm not an English speaker with a poor command of the language!

Hi, this is the Fyodor bot again. Overall, I was surprised that janitor only has 22 pages about him. It needs at least 30. Also, I'm once again inspired by some work (song/movie). So, if you want more bots with Dostoevsky, and also with a reference to some good film, you can subscribe.

I also respectfully ask you to leave feedback, even if just a brief assessment of the bot. This helps me learn from my mistakes.

(P.S. If anyone has questions about why both angst and fluff are listed in the hashtags, I would like to emphasize once again that the plot depends entirely on you, the users.)
creator: Gossip_Margaret
